rationale.org-governance: Operationalizes organization-wide ethical risk monitoring, dashboards, feedback, and internal audit.
rationale.regulatory-compliance: Maps quantitative governance measures to AML, KYC, ECOA, and IEEE 7000.
rationale.ai-review: CodeBERT and BERT judge generated code for plagiarism and bias risks.
rationale.framework: Specifies a reusable layered architecture designed for CI/CD integration.
rationale.design-only: Synthetic demonstration fabricates core metric inputs; intended-object validation remains future work.
rationale.assistive: Measures suggestion-level GPT code acceptance and modification within developer workflows.
rationale.metrics: Defines ip-plagiarism, bias, comprehensibility, and over-reliance risk scores.
rationale.risk-quality: Defines Explainability Gap to quantify generated-code comprehensibility.
rationale.risk-overreliance: Defines Automation Dependency Score from unmodified AI-code acceptance.
rationale.risk-ip: Defines Plagiarism Risk Score using similarity to public code.
rationale.risk-bias: Defines Bias Propagation Index for biased generated-code content.
